zh.Wiston, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可維斯頓
zh.Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Engl: 英國武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特
zh.Chaddesly Corbet, Worcestershire, Englan: 英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Corbet於大約1240年出生時，她的父親William de Corbet52歲，母親Ada42歲。她於1254年與Laurence de Sanford在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年之後在英國。

zh-hans.Chaddesly Corbet, Worcestershire, Englan: 英国英格兰武斯特斯爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Corbet于大约1240年出生时，她的父亲William de Corbet52岁，母亲Ada42岁。她于1254年与Laurence de Sanford在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1297年之后在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Corbet was born about 1240, her father, William de Corbet, was 52 and her mother, Ada, was 42. She married Laurence de Sanford in 1254, in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 1297, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Corbet est née environ 1240, son père, William de Corbet, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Ada, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Laurence de Sanford en 1254, à Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1297, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Corbet um 1240 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Corbet 52 und ihre Mutter Ada 42. Sie hat 1254 in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Laurence de Sanford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1297 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Corbet è nata il circa 1240, sua padre, William de Corbet, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Ada, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Laurence de Sanford nel 1254, nel Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1297, nel England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Corbetが約1240年に生まれた時，父William de Corbetは52歳，母Adaは42歳であった。1254年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアチャッドエスリー コルベットでLaurence de Sanfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1297年以後にイギリスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Corbet(이)가 대략 1240년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Corbet(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1254년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 채데슬리 코벳에서 Laurence de Sanford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 이후 영국에서 사망했다.

mn.Wiston, Sussex, England: Wiston, Sūþsēaxe, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Corbet nasceu aproximadamente 1240, seu pai, William de Corbet, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Ada, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Laurence de Sanford em 1254, em Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1297, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Corbet родилась около 1240 г., её отцу по имени William de Corbet было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Ada, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Laurence de Sanford в 1254 г. в местности чэддесли корбетт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1297 г. в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Corbet nació aproximadamente 1240, su papá, William de Corbet, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Ada, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Laurence de Sanford en 1254, en Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 1297, en Inglaterra.
